page.title: diabetic neuropathy — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for diabetic neuropathy: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for diabetic neuropathy: 109 alterations and 186 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.
